文献信息.论文标题: 3D Printing of Thermal Insulating Polyimide/Cellulose Nanocrystal Composite Aerogels with Low Dimensional Shrinkage

反应条件.制备过程: ODA加入三口烧瓶，与DMF在室温和氮气气氛下混合，逐步加入PMDA形成浅黄色聚酰胺酸前驱体溶液，之后搅拌四小时保证反应完全

位置索引.原文: First,  $4.806\mathrm{g}$  (24 mmol) ODA was added to a three-neck flask and mixed with  $100~\mathrm{mL}$  DMF under room temperature and a nitrogen atmosphere. A total of  $5.235\mathrm{g}$  (24 mmol) PMDA was gradually added to form a polyamic acid precursor solution with a light yellow color. The solution was then stirred for another four hours to ensure the completeness of the reaction.

反应条件.制备过程: 将粘稠的聚酰胺酸溶液用额外的100 mL DMF稀释，在剧烈搅拌下缓慢倒入600 mL去离子水中进行沉淀

后处理步骤: 沉淀
真空烘箱50℃干燥超过两天

位置索引.原文: Next, the viscous polyamic acid solution was diluted with another  $100~\mathrm{mL}$  DMF, and slowly poured into  $600~\mathrm{mL}$  deionized water under vigorous stirring for precipitation. The yellow polyamic acid was dried in a vacuum oven at  $50^{\circ}\mathrm{C}$  for more than two days before use.

聚合物.聚合物分类名称: Polyamic Acid Ammonium Salt/Cellulose Nanocrystal composite ink

值.说明: 具有显著剪切变稀行为
小剪切应力下呈现类凝胶行为，储能模量大于损耗模量
高剪切应力下转变为液态，损耗模量大于储能模量，适合DIW打印
随CNCs浓度升高而增大，本样品储能模量低于6.5wt%和7.4wt% CNCs的PAAS/CNC ink
随CNCs浓度升高而增大，本样品屈服应力低于6.5wt%和7.4wt% CNCs的PAAS/CNC ink

反应条件.制备过程: 先将ODA加入三颈烧瓶，与DMF在室温氮气氛围下混合，逐步加入全部PMDA，搅拌四小时保证反应完全，形成浅黄色聚酰胺酸前驱体溶液

位置索引.原文: First,  $4.806\mathrm{g}$  (24 mmol) ODA was added to a three-neck flask and mixed with  $100~\mathrm{mL}$  DMF under room temperature and a nitrogen atmosphere. A total of  $5.235\mathrm{g}$  (24 mmol) PMDA was gradually added to form a polyamic acid precursor solution with a light yellow color. The solution was then stirred for another four hours to ensure the completeness of the reaction.

反应条件.制备过程: 将粘稠的聚酰胺酸前驱体溶液用额外DMF稀释，在剧烈搅拌下缓慢倒入去离子水中沉淀，得到黄色聚酰胺酸

后处理步骤: 50℃真空干燥超过两天

位置索引.原文: Next, the viscous polyamic acid solution was diluted with another  $100~\mathrm{mL}$  DMF, and slowly poured into  $600~\mathrm{mL}$  deionized water under vigorous stirring for precipitation. The yellow polyamic acid was dried in a vacuum oven at  $50^{\circ}\mathrm{C}$  for more than two days before use.

反应条件.制备过程: 将聚酰胺酸、TEA和去离子水混合，超声处理至所有物料溶解，形成PAAS溶液

位置索引.原文: First,  $0.750\mathrm{g}$  polyamic acid,  $0.363\mathrm{g}$  TEA, and  $4.444\mathrm{g}$  deionized water were mixed in a glass vial. The solution was sonicated until all materials had dissolved to form the PAAS solution.

反应条件.制备过程: 将CNCs分散在去离子水中，加入七个特氟龙球辅助解聚CNC粉末，在1500rpm下搅拌10min，形成均匀CNC水凝胶

位置索引.原文: Next,  $700\mathrm{mg}$  of CNCs was dispersed in  $4.444\mathrm{g}$  deionized water by a planetary mixer (MV-300S, CGT, Taiwan) at  $1500\mathrm{rpm}$  for  $10\mathrm{min}$  to form a uniform CNC hydrogel. Seven Teflon balls were added in the container to deagglomerate the CNC powder better.

原料.原料类型: 纤维素纳米晶体水凝胶

反应条件.制备过程: 将水性PAAS溶液与CNC水凝胶在1500rpm下混合30min，调整CNC的用量，得到CNCs浓度为5.6wt%、聚酰胺酸浓度为7.0wt%的目标PAAS/CNC ink

位置索引.原文: Finally, the aqueous PAAS solution was mixed with the CNC hydrogel by the planetary mixer at  $1500\mathrm{rpm}$  for  $30\mathrm{min}$ . The final concentration of polyamic acid and CNCs was  $7.0\mathrm{wt\%}$  and  $6.5\mathrm{wt\%}$ , respectively. For comparison, the amount of CNC was adjusted to make inks with  $5.6\mathrm{wt\%}$ ,  $6.5\mathrm{wt\%}$ , and  $7.4\mathrm{wt\%}$  CNCs.

工艺流程.产物名称: 脱泡后待打印5.6wt% CNCs PAAS/CNC ink

反应条件.制备过程: 将制备好的PAAS/CNC ink转移到10mL一次性注射器中，用行星搅拌机去除油墨中的气泡

位置索引.原文: The as-prepared PAAS/CNC ink was transferred into a  $10~\mathrm{mL}$  disposable syringe. The bubbles within the ink were removed by the planetary mixer.

聚合物.聚合物分类名称: Polyamic Acid Ammonium Salt/Cellulose Nanocrystal composite ink

测试条件.仪器: HR-2 流变仪 (TA instruments, New Castle, DE, USA)
测试条件.工作距离: 平行板直径25mm，平行板间隙1000μm

测试条件.仪器: HR-2 流变仪 (TA instruments, New Castle, DE, USA)
测试条件.工作距离: 平行板直径25mm，平行板间隙1000μm

值.说明: 屈服应力大于200 Pa，满足直写成型要求

测试条件.方法: 振荡应力扫描法，由储能模量和损耗模量的交点计算得到屈服应力
测试条件.仪器: HR-2 流变仪 (TA instruments, New Castle, DE, USA)
测试条件.工作距离: 平行板直径25mm，平行板间隙1000μm

值.说明: 低剪切应力下储能模量大于损耗模量，呈现类凝胶行为；高剪切应力下转变为液体状态，损耗模量大于储能模量，适合直写成型

测试条件.仪器: HR-2 流变仪 (TA instruments, New Castle, DE, USA)
测试条件.工作距离: 平行板直径25mm，平行板间隙1000μm

值.说明: 可成功挤出并逐层堆叠，最高可堆叠70层，高度为28.22 mm，打印件具有良好的形状保真度

反应条件.制备过程: 先将ODA加入三口烧瓶与DMF混合，逐步加入PMDA形成淡黄色聚酰胺酸前驱体溶液，搅拌4小时保证反应完全，之后用额外100mL DMF稀释，剧烈搅拌下缓慢倒入去离子水沉淀

后处理步骤: 置于真空烘箱50℃干燥超过两天

位置索引.原文: First,  $4.806\mathrm{g}$  (24 mmol) ODA was added to a three-neck flask and mixed with  $100~\mathrm{mL}$  DMF under room temperature and a nitrogen atmosphere. A total of  $5.235\mathrm{g}$  (24 mmol) PMDA was gradually added to form a polyamic acid precursor solution with a light yellow color. The solution was then stirred for another four hours to ensure the completeness of the reaction. Next, the viscous polyamic acid solution was diluted with another  $100~\mathrm{mL}$  DMF, and slowly poured into  $600~\mathrm{mL}$  deionized water under vigorous stirring for precipitation. The yellow polyamic acid was dried in a vacuum oven at  $50^{\circ}\mathrm{C}$  for more than two days before use.

反应条件.制备过程: 将所有原料混合后超声至所有物料完全溶解

位置索引.原文: First,  $0.750\mathrm{g}$  polyamic acid,  $0.363\mathrm{g}$  TEA, and  $4.444\mathrm{g}$  deionized water were mixed in a glass vial. The solution was sonicated until all materials had dissolved to form the PAAS solution.

反应条件.制备过程: 加入7个特氟龙球促进CNC粉末解团聚，1500rpm搅拌分散CNCs形成均匀水凝胶

位置索引.原文: Next,  $700\mathrm{mg}$  of CNCs was dispersed in  $4.444\mathrm{g}$  deionized water by a planetary mixer (MV-300S, CGT, Taiwan) at  $1500\mathrm{rpm}$  for  $10\mathrm{min}$  to form a uniform CNC hydrogel. Seven Teflon balls were added in the container to deagglomerate the CNC powder better.

原料.原料类型: 纤维素纳米晶体水凝胶

反应条件.制备过程: 调整CNC用量，将水性PAAS溶液与CNC水凝胶混合搅拌，最终得到聚酰胺酸浓度7.0wt%、CNCs浓度6.5wt%的复合ink

位置索引.原文: Finally, the aqueous PAAS solution was mixed with the CNC hydrogel by the planetary mixer at  $1500\mathrm{rpm}$  for  $30\mathrm{min}$ . The final concentration of polyamic acid and CNCs was  $7.0\mathrm{wt\%}$  and  $6.5\mathrm{wt\%}$ , respectively. For comparison, the amount of CNC was adjusted to make inks with  $5.6\mathrm{wt\%}$ ,  $6.5\mathrm{wt\%}$ , and  $7.4\mathrm{wt\%}$  CNCs.

工艺流程.产物名称: 注射器内除泡后的6.5wt% CNCs PAAS/CNC ink

反应条件.制备过程: 将制备好的PAAS/CNC ink转移入10mL一次性注射器，用行星混合器去除ink内的气泡，用于后续3D打印

位置索引.原文: The as-prepared PAAS/CNC ink was transferred into a  $10~\mathrm{mL}$  disposable syringe. The bubbles within the ink were removed by the planetary mixer.

聚合物.聚合物分类名称: Polyamic Acid Ammonium Salt/Cellulose Nanocrystal composite ink

值.说明: 具有显著剪切稀化行为；低剪切应力下储能模量大于损耗模量，呈凝胶状行为；高剪切应力下转变为液体状态，损耗模量大于储能模量

测试条件.方法: 稳态剪切流测试测定黏度，振荡应力扫描测试测定储能模量和损耗模量
测试条件.仪器: HR-2 流变仪（TA instruments, New Castle, DE, USA）
测试条件.测量参数: 振荡频率1Hz，平行板直径25mm，板间距1000μm

值.说明: 屈服应力大于200 Pa

测试条件.方法: 屈服应力由储能模量和损耗模量的交点获得
测试条件.仪器: HR-2 流变仪（TA instruments, New Castle, DE, USA）
测试条件.测量参数: 平行板直径25mm，板间距1000μm，振荡频率1Hz

值.说明: 随CNCs浓度升高而增大，高于更低CNCs浓度的PAAS/CNC ink

测试条件.仪器: HR-2 流变仪（TA instruments, New Castle, DE, USA）
测试条件.测量参数: 振荡频率1Hz，平行板直径25mm，板间距1000μm

值.说明: 足以满足直接油墨书写（DIW）

反应条件.制备过程: 将ODA加入三颈烧瓶，与DMF在室温氮气氛围下混合，逐步加入PMDA形成浅黄色聚酰胺酸前驱体溶液，搅拌4小时保证反应完全，之后用额外100mL DMF稀释，在剧烈搅拌下缓慢倒入去离子水中沉淀

后处理步骤: 真空烘箱50℃干燥超过两天

位置索引.原文: First, 4.806g (24 mmol) ODA was added to a three-neck flask and mixed with 100 mL DMF under room temperature and a nitrogen atmosphere. A total of 5.235g (24 mmol) PMDA was gradually added to form a polyamic acid precursor solution with a light yellow color. The solution was then stirred for another four hours to ensure the completeness of the reaction. Next, the viscous polyamic acid solution was diluted with another 100 mL DMF, and slowly poured into 600 mL deionized water under vigorous stirring for precipitation. The yellow polyamic acid was dried in a vacuum oven at 50℃ for more than two days before use.

反应条件.制备过程: 将所有原料混合，超声至所有物料完全溶解形成PAAS溶液

位置索引.原文: First, 0.750g polyamic acid, 0.363g TEA, and 4.444g deionized water were mixed in a glass vial. The solution was sonicated until all materials had dissolved to form the PAAS solution.

反应条件.制备过程: 将CNCs分散在去离子水中，加入聚四氟乙烯球辅助解团聚，调整CNCs用量，在1500rpm转速下搅拌形成均匀CNC水凝胶，用于制备7.4wt% CNCs的目标ink

位置索引.原文: Next, 700mg of CNCs was dispersed in 4.444g deionized water by a planetary mixer (MV-300S, CGT, Taiwan) at 1500rpm for 10min to form a uniform CNC hydrogel. Seven Teflon balls were added in the container to deagglomerate the CNC powder better. For comparison, the amount of CNC was adjusted to make inks with 5.6wt%, 6.5wt%, and 7.4wt% CNCs.

原料.原料类型: 纤维素纳米晶体水凝胶

反应条件.制备过程: 将水性PAAS溶液与CNC水凝胶混合，调整CNC用量，在1500rpm转速下搅拌30min，得到最终CNCs浓度为7.4wt%、聚酰胺酸浓度为7.0wt%的复合ink

位置索引.原文: Finally, the aqueous PAAS solution was mixed with the CNC hydrogel by the planetary mixer at 1500rpm for 30min. The final concentration of polyamic acid and CNCs was 7.0wt% and 6.5wt%, respectively. For comparison, the amount of CNC was adjusted to make inks with 5.6wt%, 6.5wt%, and 7.4wt% CNCs.

工艺流程.产物名称: 脱泡后装于注射器的7.4wt% CNCs PAAS/CNC ink

反应条件.制备过程: 将制备好的PAAS/CNC ink转移到10mL一次性注射器中，用行星搅拌机去除ink内的气泡，用于后续3D打印

位置索引.原文: The as-prepared PAAS/CNC ink was transferred into a 10 mL disposable syringe. The bubbles within the ink were removed by the planetary mixer.

聚合物.聚合物分类名称: Polyamic Acid Ammonium Salt/Cellulose Nanocrystal composite ink

值.说明: 屈服应力大于200 Pa，满足直接墨水书写要求

测试条件.方法: 振荡应力扫描法，由存储模量与损耗模量的交点得到屈服应力

值.说明: 小剪切应力下存储模量大于损耗模量，呈凝胶状行为；高剪切应力下转变为液体状，损耗模量大于存储模量
可成功挤出并逐层堆叠，可堆叠至70层，高度为28.22 mm，打印后具有良好形状保真度，满足直接墨水书写要求

测试条件.方法: 直接墨水书写(DIW)打印测试

反应条件.制备过程: 先将ODA加入三口烧瓶，与DMF在室温、氮气氛围下混合，逐步加入PMDA形成淡黄色聚酰胺酸前驱体溶液，搅拌4小时保证反应完全，之后用额外DMF稀释粘稠聚酰胺酸溶液

后处理步骤: 在剧烈搅拌下将稀释后的聚酰胺酸溶液缓慢倒入去离子水中沉淀
收集黄色产物，在50℃真空烘箱中干燥超过两天备用

位置索引.原文: First,  4.806g  (24 mmol) ODA was added to a three-neck flask and mixed with  100 mL  DMF under room temperature and a nitrogen atmosphere. A total of  5.235g  (24 mmol) PMDA was gradually added to form a polyamic acid precursor solution with a light yellow color. The solution was then stirred for another four hours to ensure the completeness of the reaction. Next, the viscous polyamic acid solution was diluted with another  100 mL  DMF, and slowly poured into  600 mL  deionized water under vigorous stirring for precipitation. The yellow polyamic acid was dried in a vacuum oven at  50℃  for more than two days before use.

反应条件.制备过程: 将聚酰胺酸、TEA和去离子水混合，超声至所有物料完全溶解，形成聚酰胺酸铵盐（PAAS）溶液

位置索引.原文: First,  0.750g  polyamic acid,  0.363g  TEA, and  4.444g  deionized water were mixed in a glass vial. The solution was sonicated until all materials had dissolved to form the PAAS solution.

工艺流程.产物名称: 均匀纤维素纳米晶水凝胶

反应条件.制备过程: 将CNCs分散在去离子水中，容器中加入七个特氟龙球促进CNC粉末解团聚，在1500rpm下混合10min，形成均匀CNC水凝胶

位置索引.原文: Next,  700mg  of CNCs was dispersed in  4.444g  deionized water by a planetary mixer (MV-300S, CGT, Taiwan) at  1500rpm  for  10min  to form a uniform CNC hydrogel. Seven Teflon balls were added in the container to deagglomerate the CNC powder better.

原料.原料名称: 均匀纤维素纳米晶水凝胶

反应条件.制备过程: 将水性PAAS溶液与CNC水凝胶混合，在1500rpm下混合30min，调节浓度得到聚酰胺酸含量4.7wt%、CNCs含量6.5wt%的目标PAAS/CNC ink

位置索引.原文: Finally, the aqueous PAAS solution was mixed with the CNC hydrogel by the planetary mixer at  1500rpm  for  30min . ... A CNC of  6.5wt%  and the concentrations of polyamic acid ranged from  4.7wt%  to  9.7wt% .

工艺流程.产物名称: 打印前处理后的可打印PAAS/CNC ink

反应条件.制备过程: 将制备好的PAAS/CNC ink转移到10mL一次性注射器中，用行星混合器去除ink内部的气泡，得到可用于3D打印的ink

位置索引.原文: The as-prepared PAAS/CNC ink was transferred into a  10 mL  disposable syringe. The bubbles within the ink were removed by the planetary mixer.

值.说明: 小剪切应力下，储能模量大于损耗模量，呈现类凝胶行为；高剪切应力下，转变为类液体状态，损耗模量大于储能模量

值.说明: 可成功挤出并逐层堆叠，满足直写成型要求，能够堆叠至70层，堆叠高度达28.22 mm

反应条件.制备过程: 先将ODA加入三颈烧瓶，与DMF混合，再逐步加入PMDA形成聚酰胺酸前驱体溶液，搅拌四小时保证反应完全

后处理步骤: 用额外100mL DMF稀释聚酰胺酸溶液
缓慢倒入600mL去离子水并剧烈搅拌沉淀
50℃真空烘箱干燥超过两天

位置索引.原文: First, 4.806g (24 mmol) ODA was added to a three-neck flask and mixed with 100 mL DMF under room temperature and a nitrogen atmosphere. A total of 5.235g (24 mmol) PMDA was gradually added to form a polyamic acid precursor solution with a light yellow color. The solution was then stirred for another four hours to ensure the completeness of the reaction. Next, the viscous polyamic acid solution was diluted with another 100 mL DMF, and slowly poured into 600 mL deionized water under vigorous stirring for precipitation. The yellow polyamic acid was dried in a vacuum oven at 50℃ for more than two days before use.

工艺流程.产物名称: 聚酰胺酸铵盐水溶液（PAAS溶液）

反应条件.制备过程: 将聚酰胺酸、三乙胺和去离子水混合，超声处理至所有物料完全溶解，调整聚酰胺酸含量以获得目标9.7wt%的浓度

位置索引.原文: First, 0.750g polyamic acid, 0.363g TEA, and 4.444g deionized water were mixed in a glass vial. The solution was sonicated until all materials had dissolved to form the PAAS solution. A CNC of 6.5wt% and the concentrations of polyamic acid ranged from 4.7wt% to 9.7wt%.

工艺流程.产物名称: 均匀纤维素纳米晶水凝胶（CNC水凝胶）

反应条件.制备过程: 将CNCs分散在去离子水中，加入七个特氟龙球促进CNC粉末解团聚，行星混合机搅拌分散，调整CNC含量获得目标6.5wt%的浓度

位置索引.原文: Next, 700mg of CNCs was dispersed in 4.444g deionized water by a planetary mixer (MV-300S, CGT, Taiwan) at 1500rpm for 10min to form a uniform CNC hydrogel. Seven Teflon balls were added in the container to deagglomerate the CNC powder better.

反应条件.制备过程: 将水性PAAS溶液与CNC水凝胶混合，行星混合机搅拌，调整浓度得到PAA浓度9.7wt%、CNCs浓度6.5wt%的目标ink

后处理步骤: 转移至10mL一次性注射器
行星混合机除去ink中的气泡

位置索引.原文: Finally, the aqueous PAAS solution was mixed with the CNC hydrogel by the planetary mixer at 1500rpm for 30min. The final concentration of polyamic acid and CNCs was 7.0wt% and 6.5wt%, respectively. For comparison, the amount of CNC was adjusted to make inks with 5.6wt%, 6.5wt%, and 7.4wt% CNCs. A CNC of 6.5wt% and the concentrations of polyamic acid ranged from 4.7wt% to 9.7wt%. The as-prepared PAAS/CNC ink was transferred into a 10 mL disposable syringe. The bubbles within the ink were removed by the planetary mixer.

形貌.仪器: SU-8010 high-resolution field emission scanning electron microscope (Hitachi)
形貌.SEM: 含有一些平行片状结构，冰晶体仍发生各向异性生长，该结构在热亚胺化后通常会因气凝胶收缩而消失

反应条件.制备过程: ODA加入三口烧瓶，与DMF在室温和氮气气氛下混合，逐渐加入PMDA，搅拌四小时确保反应完全，形成浅黄色聚酰胺酸前驱体溶液

位置索引.原文: First, 4.806g (24 mmol) ODA was added to a three-neck flask and mixed with 100 mL DMF under room temperature and a nitrogen atmosphere. A total of 5.235g (24 mmol) PMDA was gradually added to form a polyamic acid precursor solution with a light yellow color. The solution was then stirred for another four hours to ensure the completeness of the reaction.

反应条件.制备过程: 粘稠的聚酰胺酸溶液用额外100mL DMF稀释，在剧烈搅拌下缓慢倒入600mL去离子水中沉淀

后处理步骤: 在真空烘箱中50℃干燥超过两天

位置索引.原文: Next, the viscous polyamic acid solution was diluted with another 100 mL DMF, and slowly poured into 600 mL deionized water under vigorous stirring for precipitation. The yellow polyamic acid was dried in a vacuum oven at 50°C for more than two days before use.

反应条件.制备过程: 将三种原料混合在玻璃样品瓶中，超声至所有物质溶解，调整浓度为7.5wt%用于制备纯PAAS气凝胶

位置索引.原文: First, 0.750g polyamic acid, 0.363g TEA, and 4.444g deionized water were mixed in a glass vial. The solution was sonicated until all materials had dissolved to form the PAAS solution. Pure PI aerogels were prepared using a 7.5wt% polyamic acid solution.

反应条件.反应装置: 改装FDM打印机（配备注射泵）
反应条件.制备过程: 将纯PAAS ink转移到10mL一次性注射器，行星搅拌机脱除气泡，将注射器安装在注射泵上，连接0.4mm圆锥形塑料喷嘴，设置打印速度20mm/s，挤出速率0.155mL/min进行3D打印，得到纯PAAS成型体

位置索引.原文: The as-prepared PAAS/CNC ink was transferred into a 10 mL disposable syringe. The bubbles within the ink were removed by the planetary mixer. A FDM printer (INFINITY X1Speed, INFINITY3DP, Kaohsiung, Taiwan) was modified for the DIW process by replacing the extruder with a 3D printed adapter. The syringe was then mounted on a syringe pump (NE-1010, New Era Instrument, Farmingdale, NY, USA) and connected to a 0.4mm conical type plastic nozzle (TPND-22G-U, Musashi Engineering, Tokyo, Japan). Typically, the printing speed was set at 20 mm / s, and the extrusion rate was 0.155 mL / min.

反应条件.制备过程: 将3D打印后的纯PAAS成型体在-20℃冰箱冷冻过夜，随后快速转移到冷冻干燥机干燥超过两天，得到目标产物

位置索引.原文: The printed objects were frozen in a -20°C refrigerator overnight. The frozen samples were rapidly transferred to a freeze dryer and dried for more than two days.

红外_FTIR.仪器: Nicolet 6700 Fourier transform infrared spectrometer (Thermo Scientific, Waltham, MA, USA)
红外_FTIR.说明: 无1540 cm⁻¹（酰胺II）和1660 cm⁻¹（酰胺C=O伸缩）信号，表明纯PI气凝胶成功酰亚胺化

核磁_NMR.仪器: Bruker Avance III HD 400 MHz NMR spectrometer
核磁_NMR.C13_NMR: 存在165.6 ppm（酰亚胺部分C=O）、156.2 ppm（苯氧基碳）、115-134 ppm（芳环）特征峰；170-190 ppm和70-90 ppm附近的峰为魔角旋转产生的旋转边带

形貌.仪器: SU-8010 high-resolution field emission scanning electron microscope (Hitachi, Tokyo, Japan)
形貌.SEM: generally showed a smaller pore distribution, lamellar morphology was less pronounced; contained smaller and denser pores compared to PI/CNC composite aerogels

值.说明: 无明显失重

性质.名称: 热酰亚胺化后剩余质量百分比

测试条件.方法: 称量冷冻干燥样品热酰亚胺化前后的重量计算得到

值.说明: 最高可达60%，远高于同体系PI/CNC复合气凝胶

测试条件.方法: 根据公式Shrinkage (%) = 100% × (V_CAD - V_s)/V_CAD计算，其中V_CAD为圆柱CAD模型体积，V_s为酰亚胺化后气凝胶的表观体积

值.说明: 因热酰亚胺化过程中严重收缩，体积密度较高，与同体系PI/CNC复合气凝胶体积密度相近

测试条件.方法: 通过酰亚胺化后样品的重量和体积计算得到

值.说明: 为同体系不同CNC浓度气凝胶中的最低值

反应条件.制备过程: 将ODA加入三颈烧瓶，与DMF混合后，逐渐加入PMDA形成浅黄色聚酰胺酸前驱体溶液，搅拌保证反应完全；再用额外DMF稀释聚酰胺酸溶液，在剧烈搅拌下缓慢倒入去离子水沉淀

工艺流程.后处理步骤: 在真空烘箱中于50℃干燥超过两天，得到黄色聚酰胺酸固体备用

位置索引.原文: First,  $4.806\mathrm{g}$  (24 mmol) ODA was added to a three-neck flask and mixed with  $100~\mathrm{mL}$  DMF under room temperature and a nitrogen atmosphere. A total of  $5.235\mathrm{g}$  (24 mmol) PMDA was gradually added to form a polyamic acid precursor solution with a light yellow color. The solution was then stirred for another four hours to ensure the completeness of the reaction. Next, the viscous polyamic acid solution was diluted with another  $100~\mathrm{mL}$  DMF, and slowly poured into  $600~\mathrm{mL}$  deionized water under vigorous stirring for precipitation. The yellow polyamic acid was dried in a vacuum oven at  $50^{\circ}\mathrm{C}$  for more than two days before use.

反应条件.制备过程: 将聚酰胺酸、TEA、去离子水混合，超声处理至所有物料完全溶解，得到浓度为7.5wt%的纯聚酰胺酸前驱体水溶液

位置索引.原文: First,  $0.750\mathrm{g}$  polyamic acid,  $0.363\mathrm{g}$  TEA, and  $4.444\mathrm{g}$  deionized water were mixed in a glass vial. The solution was sonicated until all materials had dissolved to form the PAAS solution.... Pure PI aerogels were prepared using a  $7.5\mathrm{wt\%}$  polyamic acid solution.

工艺流程.产物名称: 冷冻干燥纯聚酰胺酸气凝胶

反应条件.制备过程: 对纯聚酰胺酸前驱体水溶液进行冷冻后冷冻干燥，得到纯聚酰胺酸气凝胶

位置索引.原文: We then recorded the weight of each freeze-dried sample before and after the thermal imidization process. For the pure PI aerogel without CNCs, a significant loss of weight to  $42.3\%$  was observed.

反应条件.制备过程: 对冷冻干燥后的纯聚酰胺酸气凝胶进行热酰亚胺化处理，得到纯聚酰亚胺气凝胶

位置索引.原文: ...successful imidization of the pure PI aerogels... the thermal imidization process  $(300^{\circ}\mathrm{C})$

核磁_NMR.仪器: Bruker Avance III HD 400 MHz NMR spectrometer
核磁_NMR.C13_NMR: Characteristic signals of CNCs: 65.6 ppm (C6 crystalline), 70-75 ppm (C2, C3, C5), 84-89 ppm (C4), 104.9 ppm (C1)

形貌.仪器: SU-8010 high-resolution field emission scanning electron microscope (Hitachi, Tokyo, Japan)
形貌.SEM: Freeze-dried pure CNC aerogel formed much larger pores than composite aerogels; low concentration of CNCs was not enough to form strongly packed networks; the pure CNC aerogel was too fragile for further studies

热亚胺化处理后部分CNC发生热降解，样品颜色变深

反应条件.制备过程: 将CNCs分散在去离子水中，加入七个特氟龙球以更好地解聚CNC粉末，在1500rpm下混合10min，形成均匀的纯CNC水凝胶（即纯CNC ink），最终CNC浓度为6.5wt%

Seven Teflon balls were added in the container to deagglomerate the CNC powder better. For comparison, [...] Pure CNC aerogels were prepared from the inks containing only 6.5wt% CNCs.

反应条件.制备过程: 由仅含6.5wt% CNC的纯CNC ink制备得到纯CNC气凝胶

后处理步骤: 冷冻干燥
热处理

位置索引.原文: Pure CNC aerogels were prepared from the inks containing only 6.5wt% CNCs. We also examined the morphology of the freeze-dried pure PAAS and pure CNC aerogels (Figure S7). Volumetric shrinkage ratio of aerogels after freeze-drying and after thermal imidization. [...] the pure CNC aerogel only shrank slightly. However, the color of the pure CNC aerogels became darker, indicating that some CNCs were thermally degraded.

红外_FTIR.仪器: Nicolet 6700 Fourier transform infrared spectrometer (Thermo Scientific, Waltham, MA, USA)
红外_FTIR.说明: FTIR谱与纯PI气凝胶相似，CNCs的加入不影响PI的酰亚胺化过程，3400 cm⁻¹处的羟基特征峰表明大量CNCs保留在复合气凝胶中

核磁_NMR.仪器: Bruker Avance III HD 400 MHz NMR spectrometer
核磁_NMR.C13_NMR: 可检测到CNCs的特征碳信号：65.6 ppm (C6 crystalline)、70-75 ppm (C2, C3, C5)、84-89 ppm (C4)、104.9 ppm (C1)；以及PI的特征碳信号：165.6 ppm (酰亚胺C=O)、156.2 ppm (苯氧碳)、115-134 ppm (芳环)；未发现新信号，表明大多数CNCs未在热酰亚胺化过程中降解，PAA与CNCs的反应极少，复合气凝胶实现完全酰亚胺化，大量CNCs保留

形貌.仪器: SU-8010 high-resolution field emission scanning electron microscope (Hitachi, Tokyo, Japan)
形貌.SEM: 与不同CNC浓度的PI/CNC复合气凝胶形貌相似，具有层状结构，平行孔由冰晶沿冷冻前沿各向异性生长形成，相较于纯PI气凝胶层状结构更明显，孔尺寸更大

值.说明: 第一阶段降解，对应CNCs的分解
第二阶段降解，对应PI基体的分解
比更高CNC含量的PI/CNC复合气凝胶更显著

测试条件.方法: 热重分析结合冷冻干燥后样品称重

测试条件.方法: 基于CAD模型体积和样品表观体积计算

性质.名称: 热亚胺化后初始体积保留率

The solution was then stirred for another four hours to ensure the completeness of the reaction.

反应条件.制备过程: 将粘稠聚酰胺酸溶液用额外100mL DMF稀释，剧烈搅拌下缓慢倒入600mL去离子水进行沉淀

后处理步骤: 真空烘箱50℃干燥超过两天

反应条件.制备过程: 将聚酰胺酸、TEA、去离子水加入玻璃小瓶混合，超声至所有原料溶解形成PAAS溶液

位置索引.原文: First,  0.750g polyamic acid,  0.363g TEA, and  4.444g deionized water were mixed in a glass vial. The solution was sonicated until all materials had dissolved to form the PAAS solution.

The final concentration of polyamic acid and CNCs was  7.0wt%  and  6.5wt% , respectively. For comparison, the amount of CNC was adjusted to make inks with  5.6wt% ,  6.5wt% , and  7.4wt%  CNCs.

原料.原料类型: 聚酰胺酸/纤维素纳米晶复合打印油墨

反应条件.反应装置: 改造FDM打印机（INFINITY X1Speed, INFINITY3DP）、注射泵（NE-1010, New Era Instrument）、0.4mm锥形塑料喷嘴（TPND-22G-U, Musashi Engineering）
反应条件.制备过程: 将复合ink转移入10mL一次性注射器，行星搅拌机除去油墨中气泡，注射器安装到注射泵并连接喷嘴，通过Repetier软件控制打印机，Slic3r生成G代码进行直写成型

位置索引.原文: The as-prepared PAAS/CNC ink was transferred into a  10 mL  disposable syringe. The bubbles within the ink were removed by the planetary mixer. A FDM printer (INFINITY X1Speed, INFINITY3DP, Kaohsiung, Taiwan) was modified for the DIW process by replacing the extruder with a 3D printed adapter. The syringe was then mounted on a syringe pump (NE-1010, New Era Instrument, Farmingdale, NY, USA) and connected to a  0.4mm  conical type plastic nozzle (TPND-22G-U, Musashi Engineering, Tokyo, Japan). The printer was controlled by Repetier software, and the G-codes were generated from the Slic3r toolpath generator. Typically, the printing speed was set at  20 mm / s , and the extrusion rate was  0.155 mL / min .

反应条件.制备过程: 打印好的坯体先冷冻，再冷冻干燥除去水分

冷冻干燥机干燥超过两天

位置索引.原文: The printed objects were frozen in a  -20℃  refrigerator overnight. The frozen samples were rapidly transferred to a freeze dryer and dried for more than two days.

原料.原料类型: 聚酰胺酸/CNC复合干燥坯体

反应条件.制备过程: 干燥样品在真空下进行程序升温热处理，完成酰亚胺化得到PI/CNC复合气凝胶
反应条件.反应条件: 真空环境，升温程序：从80℃依次升温至120℃、180℃、240℃、300℃，每个温度保温1小时，升温速率1℃/min

位置索引.原文: The dried samples further underwent a sequential temperature increase from 80, 120, 180, 240, to  300℃  under vacuum to form the PI/CNC composite aerogels. Each temperature was held for one hour, and the ramping rate was  1℃/min  in all cases.

红外_FTIR.说明: FTIR谱与纯PI气凝胶相似，CNCs不影响酰亚胺化，未出现1540 cm⁻¹和1660 cm⁻¹的酰胺特征信号，证明酰亚胺化成功，大量CNCs经热酰亚胺化后仍保留在复合气凝胶中

反应条件.制备过程: 将复合油墨转移到10mL一次性注射器，行星混合器去除气泡后安装到打印系统，由Repetier软件控制，Slic3r生成G代码进行直写打印

位置索引.原文: The as-prepared PAAS/CNC ink was transferred into a 10 mL disposable syringe. The bubbles within the ink were removed by the planetary mixer. A FDM printer (INFINITY X1Speed, INFINITY3DP, Kaohsiung, Taiwan) was modified for the DIW process by replacing the extruder with a 3D printed adapter. The syringe was then mounted on a syringe pump (NE-1010, New Era Instrument, Farmingdale, NY, USA) and connected to a 0.4mm conical type plastic nozzle (TPND-22G-U, Musashi Engineering, Tokyo, Japan). The printer was controlled by Repetier software, and the G-codes were generated from the Slic3r toolpath generator. Typically, the printing speed was set at 20 mm / s, and the extrusion rate was 0.155 mL / min.

反应条件.制备过程: 打印物体先冷冻，再冷冻干燥

位置索引.原文: The printed objects were frozen in a -20℃ refrigerator overnight. The frozen samples were rapidly transferred to a freeze dryer and dried for more than two days.

反应条件.制备过程: 冻干样品进行程序升温热处理，完成热酰亚胺化，得到最终PI/CNC复合气凝胶

位置索引.原文: The dried samples further underwent a sequential temperature increase from 80, 120, 180, 240, to 300℃ under vacuum to form the PI/CNC composite aerogels. Each temperature was held for one hour, and the ramping rate was 1℃/min in all cases.

红外_FTIR.仪器: Nicolet 6700 Fourier transform infrared spectrometer (Thermo Scientific)

核磁_NMR.仪器: Bruker Avance III HD 400 MHz NMR spectrometer
核磁_NMR.C13_NMR: 检出酰亚胺C=O特征峰165.6 ppm、苯氧碳特征峰156.2 ppm、芳香环碳特征峰115-134 ppm；同时检出CNCs的特征碳信号：65.6 ppm (C6结晶)、70-75 ppm (C2/C3/C5)、84-89 ppm (C4)、104.9 ppm (C1)；未发现新信号，表明多数CNCs未发生热降解，PAA与CNCs反应极少，实现完全咪唑化

形貌.仪器: high-resolution field emission scanning electron microscope (SU-8010, Hitachi)
形貌.SEM: 具有CNCs诱导形成的层状结构，平行孔由冰晶沿冷冻前沿各向异性生长形成；不同CNC浓度的PI/CNC复合气凝胶形貌相似，相比纯PI气凝胶，层状结构更显著，孔径更大；随着CNC浓度升高体积收缩降低，本样品为高浓度CNC样品，形状保留较好

性质.名称: 第一降解起始温度（CNC组分）
第二降解起始温度（PI组分）

值.说明: 随CNCs浓度升高而降低，7.4wt% CNCs样品为该系列体积收缩率最低

测试条件.方法: 根据CAD模型体积与气凝胶表观体积计算，公式为Shrinkage (%) = 100% × (V_CAD - V_s)/V_CAD

性质.名称: 热亚胺化后体积保留率

值.说明: 随CNCs浓度升高而升高，7.4wt% CNCs样品为该系列体积保留率最高

测试条件.方法: 根据CAD模型体积与气凝胶表观体积计算

值.说明: 随CNCs浓度升高而增大，7.4wt% CNCs样品为该系列复合气凝胶中最高值

测试条件.方法: 由热亚胺化后样品的重量和体积计算得到

值.说明: 随CNCs浓度升高而增大，为该系列复合气凝胶中最高值

测试条件.方法: 压缩性能测试，遵循ASTM-D695标准
测试条件.仪器: 万能电子试验机AGS-X 100kN (Shimadzu)，配备10kN测力传感器

值.说明: 随CNCs浓度升高而增大，7.4wt% CNCs样品为该系列复合气凝胶中最高值

测试条件.方法: 压缩性能测试，遵循ASTM-D695标准
测试条件.仪器: 万能电子试验机AGS-X 100kN (Shimadzu)，配备10kN测力传感器

值.说明: 300°C热亚胺化后仍有大量CNCs残留，CNCs的重量损失极小

测试条件.方法: 热重分析结合热亚胺化前后样品称重分析

值.说明: 具有良好的热绝缘能力

测试条件.方法: 热成像测试，样品放置于160°C热板上，加热10min后观察

反应条件.制备过程: 将ODA加入三口烧瓶，与DMF在室温氮气气氛下混合，逐步加入PMDA形成浅黄色聚酰胺酸前驱体溶液，搅拌4小时保证反应完全，之后用额外100mL DMF稀释粘稠聚酰胺酸溶液

后处理步骤: 剧烈搅拌下将稀释后的聚酰胺酸溶液缓慢倒入600mL去离子水中沉淀
真空烘箱50℃干燥超过两天

位置索引.原文: First,  4.806g  (24 mmol) ODA was added to a three-neck flask and mixed with  100 mL  DMF under room temperature and a nitrogen atmosphere. A total of  5.235g  (24 mmol) PMDA was gradually added to form a polyamic acid precursor solution with a light yellow color. The solution was then stirred for another four hours to ensure the completeness of the reaction. Next, the viscous polyamic acid solution was diluted with another  100 mL  DMF, and slowly poured into  600 mL  deionized water under vigorous stirring for precipitation. The yellow polyamic acid was dried in a vacuum oven at  50℃  for more than two days before use.

反应条件.制备过程: 将聚酰胺酸、TEA、去离子水加入玻璃样品瓶混合，超声处理至所有物料完全溶解，形成PAAS溶液

位置索引.原文: First,  0.750g  polyamic acid,  0.363g  TEA, and  4.444g  deionized water were mixed in a glass vial. The solution was sonicated until all materials had dissolved to form the PAAS solution.

工艺流程.产物名称: 纤维素纳米晶体水凝胶

反应条件.制备过程: 将CNCs分散在去离子水中，加入7个特氟龙球促进CNC粉末解团聚，行星混合器1500rpm搅拌10min形成均匀CNC水凝胶，调整CNC投料量以制备最终浓度为7.4wt%的复合墨水

位置索引.原文: Next,  700mg  of CNCs was dispersed in  4.444g  deionized water by a planetary mixer (MV-300S, CGT, Taiwan) at  1500rpm  for  10min  to form a uniform CNC hydrogel. Seven Teflon balls were added in the container to deagglomerate the CNC powder better. ... For comparison, the amount of CNC was adjusted to make inks with  5.6wt% ,  6.5wt% , and  7.4wt%  CNCs.

原料.原料类型: 纤维素纳米晶体水凝胶

反应条件.制备过程: 将PAAS水溶液与CNC水凝胶混合，行星混合器1500rpm搅拌30min，调整CNC投料量使最终CNC浓度为7.4wt%，聚酰胺酸浓度为7.0wt%

位置索引.原文: Finally, the aqueous PAAS solution was mixed with the CNC hydrogel by the planetary mixer at  1500rpm  for  30min . The final concentration of polyamic acid and CNCs was  7.0wt%  and  6.5wt% , respectively. For comparison, the amount of CNC was adjusted to make inks with  5.6wt% ,  6.5wt% , and  7.4wt%  CNCs.

反应条件.反应装置: 改装FDM打印机（INFINITY X1Speed, INFINITY3DP）、10mL一次性注射器、注射器泵（NE-1010, New Era Instrument）、0.4mm锥形塑料喷嘴
反应条件.制备过程: 将制备好的复合墨水转移到10mL一次性注射器，行星混合器脱除墨水内气泡；改装FDM打印机用于DIW工艺，更换挤出头为3D打印适配器，安装注射器和喷嘴，通过Repetier软件控制打印机，Slic3r生成G代码进行3D打印得到打印坯体

位置索引.原文: The as-prepared PAAS/CNC ink was transferred into a  10 mL  disposable syringe. The bubbles within the ink were removed by the planetary mixer. A FDM printer (INFINITY X1Speed, INFINITY3DP, Kaohsiung, Taiwan) was modified for the DIW process by replacing the extruder with a 3D printed adapter. The syringe was then mounted on a syringe pump (NE-1010, New Era Instrument, Farmingdale, NY, USA) and connected to a  0.4mm  conical type plastic nozzle (TPND-22G-U, Musashi Engineering, Tokyo, Japan). The printer was controlled by Repetier software, and the G-codes were generated from the Slic3r toolpath generator. Typically, the printing speed was set at  20 mm / s , and the extrusion rate was  0.155 mL / min .

工艺流程.产物名称: 冷冻干燥PAAS/CNC复合干燥坯体

反应条件.制备过程: 将打印后的物件放入-20℃冰箱冷冻过夜，随后快速转移到冷冻干燥机干燥超过两天得到干燥坯体

后处理步骤: -20℃冰箱冷冻过夜
冷冻干燥机干燥超过两天

位置索引.原文: The printed objects were frozen in a  -20℃  refrigerator overnight. The frozen samples were rapidly transferred to a freeze dryer and dried for more than two days.

原料.原料名称: 冷冻干燥PAAS/CNC复合干燥坯体
原料.原料类型: 聚酰胺酸/CNC复合干燥坯体

反应条件.制备过程: 干燥样品在真空下进行程序升温热处理完成热酰亚胺化，得到最终PI/CNC复合气凝胶
反应条件.反应条件: 真空环境，程序升温：80℃→120℃→180℃→240℃→300℃，升温速率1℃/min，每个温度保温1小时

Each temperature was held for one hour, and the ramping rate was  1℃/min  in all cases. ... Fortunately, a significant amount of CNCs remained in the aerogels prepared by  6.5wt%  and  7.4wt%  CNCs.
